notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you tried to reach doesn't exist or has moved.

kanban.noTickets: No open tickets in this department.

hygiene.empty: No hygiene issues to triage. Rows appear here when transitions land with a non-clean hygiene_status.

activity.empty: No activity yet. Events appear here as agents spawn, transition tickets, and finalize.

activityMeta.empty: No activity yet — events will stream in as agents transition tickets.

agentsMeta.noAgentsInDept: No agents configured for this department.

ticketDetail.noInstances: No agent instances have run for this ticket.
ticketDetail.palaceLinksHint: Use the ticket id below as a search term in MemPalace to surface diary entries and KG triples written for this ticket.

auth.invite_already_redeemed: Invite link has already been used.
auth.first_run_locked: First-run setup is no longer available.
auth.email_already_exists: An account with this email already exists.

cost_blind_spot.tooltip: Cost telemetry blind spot: clean-finalize runs report $0.00. See docs/issues/cost-telemetry-blind-spot.md.

sandbox_escape.tooltip: Sandbox escape: the agent's claimed artifact path differs from what's on disk. See docs/issues/agent-workspace-sandboxing.md.

conflict.stale_version: Another operator changed this since you opened the form. Review the conflict and choose to overwrite, merge, or discard.
conflict.already_exists: Something with this identifier already exists.
conflict.in_use: Cannot delete: the item is referenced by other rows.
conflict.rotation_step_failed: A step of this multi-step operation failed. Review the partial state and retry the affected step.
conflict.path_collision: Target path collides with an existing path.

vault.vault_unavailable: Cannot reach Infisical right now. Check the vault container and try again.
vault.vault_auth_expired: The dashboard's vault credential expired. Restart the dashboard or re-provision the machine identity per docs/ops-checklist.md M4 section.
vault.vault_permission_denied: Infisical denied this operation. Check the dashboard's machine-identity grants.
vault.vault_rate_limited: Infisical rate-limited this request. Wait a moment and try again.
vault.vault_secret_not_found: Secret not found in the vault.
vault.vault_path_already_exists: A secret already exists at this path.
vault.vault_validation_rejected: Validation failed: review the form fields and try again.
vault.vault_rotation_unsupported: This secret type does not support automated rotation. Use paste-new-value instead.
vault.vault_grant_conflict: A grant with this role and env-var-name combination already exists.
vault.vault_secret_in_use_cannot_delete: Cannot delete: this secret is currently granted to one or more agent roles. Remove the grants first.

setup.heading: First-run setup
setup.description: Create the inaugural operator account. This page disappears once an account exists.
setup.name: Name

invite.heading: Accept invite
invite.description: You were invited to join this Garrison instance as an operator. Set your account details to continue.
invite.name: Name

admin.heading: Operator invites
admin.description: Generate a one-time link to invite an additional operator. Share the link out-of-band; it expires after 72 hours.
